description_long: This is a small, standalone garage structure with a pitched terracotta-tiled roof and a rectangular white chimney vent at the center. The front facade features a large green garage door, flanked by plain white walls and a single arched window on the right. The roof is composed of overlapping reddish-orange tiles, giving it a Mediterranean appearance. The side and rear walls are unadorned, constructed from smooth, light-colored concrete or stucco. The garage door appears to be a single panel type, with no visible decorative hardware. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for residential neighborhoods.
description: A compact garage with a terracotta-tiled roof, white walls, a green single-panel door, and an arched window.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green garage door, arched window, and central chimney vent.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the tiled roof and plain white wall with the chimney visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the unadorned white wall and the full expanse of the tiled roof.
description_view_3: Right side view with the tiled roof, plain wall, and chimney vent visible.
